hero.headline: 27 Years of Polk County Pool Perfection
hero.subheadline: From weekly maintenance to stunning remodels and outdoor kitchens, Mannix Pools & Grills has been the name Winter Haven families trust since 1999. Florida State Certified, BBB A+ rated, and chemicals always included.
checkmarks: Chemicals included with every weekly service
Full outdoor living: pools, grills, kitchens & pavers

services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living Solutions
services.subtitle: From crystal-clear pools to sizzling grills, we handle every detail of your backyard paradise.

cards.title: Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Professional weekly cleaning with chemicals included. We also rescue green pools and restore them to sparkling condition fast.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Transform your outdated pool into a modern backyard retreat. New finishes, tile, coping, and complete renovations done right.

cards.title: Equipment Sales & Repair
cards.description: Top-brand pool equipment sold and serviced by factory-trained technicians. Pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems.

cards.title: Custom Pavers
cards.description: Beautiful walkways, patios, and pool decks designed to complement your home. Dozens of styles and colors available.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens
cards.description: Custom-designed cooking spaces with premium materials and built-in features for the ultimate backyard entertaining experience.

cards.title: Grills & Accessories
cards.description: Authorized dealer for Big Green Egg, Delta Heat, and Napoleon grills. Expert guidance to find your perfect setup.

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Reach out by phone or form. Tell us about your pool, outdoor space, or project vision.

steps.title: Free On-Site Consultation
steps.description: A factory-trained technician visits your property, assesses your needs, and provides an honest, no-surprise quote.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard
steps.description: We complete the work on time and on budget. Then sit back and enjoy your upgraded outdoor living space.

about.label: About Mannix Pools & Grills
about.headline: A Winter Haven Family Business Since 1999
about.description: Founded by B.J. Mannix as a one-person operation, Mannix Pools & Grills has grown into Polk County's trusted full-service outdoor living provider. Born in Mitchell, Indiana and raised right here in Winter Haven, B.J. built this company on relationships, not contracts. Every technician is factory-trained, every quote is fair, and every customer is treated like a neighbor. As B.J. says: "Nothing is more satisfying than a customer who loves the work we do and tells their friends."

features.title: 27+ Years of Local Expertise
features.description: Serving Polk County since 1999 with deep knowledge of local pool conditions and building codes.

features.title: Certified Warranty Center
features.description: Authorized warranty center for major manufacturers. Your equipment repairs are covered and done right.

features.title: No Contracts, Just Results
features.description: We earn your business every visit. No long-term commitments — just honest work and fair pricing.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every quote includes chemicals, labor, and honest communication from start to finish. No hidden fees, ever.

guarantee.headline: Our 100% Satisfaction Promise
guarantee.description: We stand behind every service call, remodel, and installation. If you are not completely satisfied with our work, we will make it right at no additional cost. That is the Mannix commitment — the same integrity that has kept Polk County families coming back for over 27 years.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Polk County including Winter Haven, Lakeland, Lake Wales, Bartow, Auburndale, Davenport, Haines City, Lake Alfred, Mulberry, Eagle Lake, Frostproof, and Polk City.

faqs.question: Are chemicals included with weekly pool service?
faqs.answer: Yes! All necessary chemicals are included with our weekly pool maintenance plans. No surprise chemical charges or add-on fees.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All our technicians are factory-trained and we are a Florida State Certified Pool Contractor (CPC-1458804) and certified warranty center for major manufacturers.

faqs.question: Do you offer free estimates?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide free on-site consultations and estimates for all projects including remodels, pavers, outdoor kitchens, and equipment installations.

faqs.question: Can you help with my green or neglected pool?
faqs.answer: Definitely. Green pool cleanup is one of our specialties. We can restore even the most neglected pools to crystal-clear condition, usually within a few days.

testimonials.name: Loyal Customer
testimonials.text: We have been using Mannix Pools for 11 years and always had wonderful and fast service. They truly treat you like family.

testimonials.name: Pool Remodel Customer
testimonials.text: Mannix totally remodeled our pool, always were in contact and went above and beyond! Our pool and deck look absolutely great!

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: They were timely and stayed in quote with no surprises. Very professional and honest. Exactly what you want in a contractor.

contact.headline: Ready to Transform Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Call us today or fill out the form for a free, no-obligation estimate on any pool or outdoor living project.
benefits: Serving all of Polk County since 1999

footer.description: Mannix Pools & Grills has proudly served Polk County families since 1999. Florida State Certified Contractor providing pool maintenance, remodeling, outdoor kitchens, pavers, and premium grills.
footer.service_area: Serving Winter Haven, Lakeland, Lake Wales, Bartow, Auburndale, Davenport, Haines City, and all of Polk County, Florida.
